[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 100000110 3
1 010110010 4
2 101101001 5
3 100001111 5
4 000010100 2
5 000010001 2
6 101110011 6
7 010111100 5

45 54 100000010 2
56 65 000000010 1
67 76 000100000 1
70 07 100001001 3

24 42 000010001 2 match 5

71 17 000000000 a
